reasoning_content:
I need to fix these compilation errors:
1. The `any` field is `void*`, need to cast to `llvm::Value*`
2. LLVM 17 uses opaque pointers, so `getPointerElementType()` doesn't exist

Let me fix these issues.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -i 's/return varDecl->any;/return static_cast<llvm::Value*>(varDecl->any);/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp\nsed -i 's/return funcDecl->any;/return static_cast<llvm::Value*>(funcDecl->any);/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp", "summary": "Fix void* to Value* conversion"}
